payload: Check whats need to be completed before m9 and do it

Step 1.1: Create caso-finanzas-politicas backend files (types.ts, queries.ts, transform.ts). Task: task-1774082357-b931. See scratchpad for full M9 plan. Reference investigation-data.ts in same dir for data shapes and TASKS.md Phase 5 for spec.

task-1774082357-b931: Created caso-finanzas-politicas types.ts, queries.ts, transform.ts. Types: FinPolPerson, FinPolClaim, FinPolMoneyFlow, FinPolShellCompany, FinPolGovernmentAction + Zod schemas. Queries delegate generic ops to query builder, domain-specific for Claims/MoneyFlows/ShellCompanies. tsc clean. Commit 5133098.

caso-finanzas-politicas types/queries/transform (commit 5133098): all queries parameterized with caso_slug, follows casepo patterns, tsc clean (2 pre-existing errors in EvidenceExplorer unrelated). Minor: getMoneyFlowGraph duplicates getGraph.

Step 1 sub-task 1.1 review passed. Next: sub-tasks 1.2 (rewrite caso-libra/queries.ts with generic labels + caso_slug + query builder delegation) and 1.3 (add new node types to graph/constants.ts LABEL_COLORS and LABEL_DISPLAY). Both are ready with no blockers.

Sub-task 1.2: Rewrite caso-libra/queries.ts — replace CasoLibra* prefixed labels with generic labels + caso_slug, delegate generic ops to query builder (see scratchpad for detailed guidance). File: webapp/src/lib/caso-libra/queries.ts. Reference: webapp/src/lib/caso-finanzas-politicas/queries.ts

Sub-task 1.3: Added ShellCompany, Aircraft, Wallet, Token, Claim, MoneyFlow, GovernmentAction to LABEL_COLORS and LABEL_DISPLAY in graph/constants.ts. Commit 99b9ab9. tsc passes (pre-existing errors only).

Sub-task 1.3 verified: 7 new labels (ShellCompany, Aircraft, Wallet, Token, Claim, MoneyFlow, GovernmentAction) correctly added to LABEL_COLORS and LABEL_DISPLAY in graph/constants.ts. tsc passes (pre-existing EvidenceExplorer error only).

Sub-task 1.3 (graph constants) review passed and closed. Remaining: sub-task 1.2 (caso-libra queries rewrite, task-1774082360-0f48). Builder should pick up 1.2 — rewrite caso-libra/queries.ts to use generic labels + caso_slug + query builder delegation per guidance in scratchpad.

Sub-task 1.2: Rewrite caso-libra/queries.ts — replace CasoLibra* prefixed labels with generic labels + caso_slug param, delegate to query builder where possible (task-1774082360-0f48). See scratchpad Builder Guidance for 1.2 section for detailed instructions.

Sub-task 1.2 complete: rewrote caso-libra/queries.ts — replaced all CasoLibra* labels with generic labels + caso_slug, delegated 5 generic ops to query builder, kept 3 domain-specific queries. tsc passes. Committed 48064e2.

Sub-task 1.2 review passed. caso-libra/queries.ts rewrite verified: all CasoLibra* labels replaced, 5 ops delegated to query builder, 3 domain queries kept with caso_slug filtering, tsc passes, no injection risk, no callers broken.

Step 1 (Phase 5 Backend) complete — all 3 sub-tasks reviewed and closed (1.1 finpol types/queries/transform, 1.2 caso-libra queries rewrite, 1.3 graph constants). Advancing to Step 2 (Phase 6 Frontend Standardization). Sub-tasks 2.1-2.6 outlined in scratchpad — Planner should materialize them as runtime tasks.

Step 2 (Phase 6 Frontend) started. Sub-task 2.1: Fix hardcoded fetch URLs in 4 [slug] pages — replace /api/caso-libra/ with /api/caso/${slug}/. Task: task-1774083484-765b. See scratchpad Builder Guidance for 2.1.

Sub-task 2.1 complete: replaced 4 hardcoded /api/caso-libra/ fetch URLs with /api/caso/${slug}/ in dinero, investigacion, evidencia, actor pages. Created 4 generic API routes (wallets, person, document, investigation) that validate slug via registry and delegate to case-specific query functions. tsc passes (pre-existing EvidenceExplorer errors only). Commit 5264444.
Sub-task 2.1 review passed. All 4 hardcoded fetch URLs replaced, 4 generic API routes created with proper slug validation and delegation. tsc passes. No blocking issues.
Sub-task 2.1 review passed. 4 sub-tasks remain in Step 2. Next: 2.2 InvestigationNav refactor — replace hardcoded CASE_TABS with registry config lookup.

Sub-task 2.2: Refactor InvestigationNav.tsx — replace hardcoded CASE_TABS with registry config lookup. File: webapp/src/components/investigation/InvestigationNav.tsx. See scratchpad for detailed builder guidance.
Sub-task 2.2: Refactored InvestigationNav.tsx — replaced hardcoded CASE_TABS with TAB_DEFS driven by registry config. 119→97 lines. tsc passes. Commit 282f070.

Sub-task 2.2: InvestigationNav refactor review PASSED. tsc passes. CASE_TABS/DEFAULT_TABS fully replaced with TAB_DEFS + registry config. No any types, no injection risk, no YAGNI. Non-blocking: caso-epstein simulation href aligned from /simulacion to /simular (both routes exist, registry says simular).
Sub-task 2.2 (InvestigationNav refactor) review passed. 2/5 Step 2 sub-tasks done. Next: 2.3 — delete static caso-epstein/ route directory (task-1774084158-d897). Builder guidance in scratchpad.

Sub-task 2.3: Delete static caso-epstein/ route directory (task-1774084158-d897). Diff each static page against [slug] equivalent, verify no unique logic, then rm -rf the directory. Builder guidance in scratchpad.

Sub-task 2.3: Deleted static caso-epstein/ route directory (6 files). Merged all unique Epstein content into [slug] pages via 4 new content components + slug-based routing in 5 page files. Hardcoded links parameterized. tsc passes. Commit dd5c9da.

Sub-task 2.3: Delete static caso-epstein/ route directory — review PASSED. All 6 static files deleted, 4 content components created under [slug]/, slug-based routing correct, links parameterized, tsc passes, no issues found.

Sub-task 2.3 (delete caso-epstein) review passed (commit dd5c9da). Advancing to 2.4 (delete finanzas-politicas static routes). Builder guidance written to scratchpad — 8 files to migrate, including unique conexiones/ route that needs [slug]/conexiones/ created. CASE_META entry needed in [slug]/layout.tsx. Generic /api/caso/[slug]/graph route already exists.

Sub-task 2.4: Delete static finanzas-politicas/ route directory — migrate 8 files (layout, page, cronologia, dinero, investigacion, resumen, conexiones/page, conexiones/ConexionesGraph) into [slug] pages. Create new [slug]/conexiones/ route. Add CASE_META entry. Parameterize hardcoded fetch URLs. Builder guidance in scratchpad.

Sub-task 2.4: Deleted static finanzas-politicas/ (8 files) — migrated to [slug] pages. Created 5 FinPol content components + new [slug]/conexiones/ route. Parameterized ConexionesGraph fetch URL. Added CASE_META entry. tsc passes. Commit 00e3e65.

Sub-task 2.4 (delete finanzas-politicas static routes) review passed. All 8 files deleted, 5 FinPol content components created, new conexiones route added, ConexionesGraph fetch URL parameterized, CASE_META entry added. tsc passes. Commit 00e3e65.

Sub-task 2.4 (delete finanzas-politicas static routes) review passed (commit 00e3e65). 4/5 Step 2 sub-tasks done. Remaining: 2.5 i18n — browser language detection + bilingual titles (task-1774074000-i18n). Advancing queue for Builder.

Sub-task 2.5 i18n — browser language detection + bilingual titles/metadata. Final sub-task of Step 2 and M9. Builder guidance in scratchpad. 3 changes: (1) browser lang detection in LanguageProvider, (2) DynamicHtmlLang component for html lang attr, (3) bilingual CASE_META titles with client-side document.title updates.

Sub-task 2.5 i18n completed (commit 8853dc5). Browser lang detection in LanguageProvider, DynamicHtmlLang + BilingualDocTitle components, bilingual CASE_META. tsc passes. This is the FINAL sub-task — M9 Step 2 and M9 overall are now complete.
Sub-task 2.5 i18n review passed (commit 8853dc5). All M9 sub-tasks complete: 2.1 fetch URLs, 2.2 InvestigationNav, 2.3 delete caso-epstein, 2.4 delete finanzas-politicas, 2.5 i18n. M9 is done.

M9 Investigation Standardization complete. All sub-tasks passed: generic API routes, registry config, InvestigationNav refactor, static caso-epstein and finanzas-politicas routes deleted and merged into [slug], i18n browser language detection + bilingual titles. tsc passes, build succeeds.
